property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.4\bin;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.4\libnvvp;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.5\bin;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.5\libnvvp;C:\Program Files\ImageMagick-7.1.1-Q16-HDRI;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Workstation\bin\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\terraform_1.9.8_windows_amd64;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\BuildTools\VC\Tools\MSVC\14.42.34433\bin\Hostx64\x64;C:\ffmpeg\ffmpeg-7.1-essentials_build\bin;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\Nsight Compute 2024.1.1\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\crist\Downloads\php;C:\ProgramData\ComposerSetup\bin;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Users\crist\.local\bin;C:\Users\crist\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\crist\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\16\bin;C:\Users\crist\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\crist\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\crist\AppData\Roaming\Composer\vendor\bin;C:\Users\crist\.fly\bin;C:\Users\crist\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\crist\.lmstudio\bin;C:\Users\crist\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Program Files\Maven\bin;;.

testcase.name: testParallel
